sourceAuthority: non-authoritative evidence snapshot; does not promote Maintainability Graph or replace tree-native operational source
createdFor: Actual Representative Runtime Feasibility Demo evidence strengthening
derivationNotes: Project nodes are manually derived from confirmed Product node PT-SEARCH-001 and Work node WT-SEARCH-001.
Boundaries use expectedFiles and forbiddenFiles from work-tree.json.
This file strengthens Product -> Project -> Work traceability for the representative demo only.
PP-001 was user-confirmed on 2026-06-24, so title-only project boundaries are marked stale until note/content search work and evidence are refreshed.
limitations: This is not generated by the CLI.
This is not a runtime source promotion.
It does not prove the actual Todo app file structure exists outside the illustrative slice.
It does not prove refreshed title + note implementation exists.
